summary: Verified PostCSS/Tailwind bug fix on localhost:3001 (Vite dev server). Login page renders with fully applied Tailwind styles (blue Sign In button rgb(37,99,235), styled inputs, demo credentials box, proper card layout). /src/index.css compiles to 27KB of Tailwind CSS returning HTTP 200. No PostCSS or 'module is not defined' errors in supervisor logs since postcss.config.cjs rename. Console has no PostCSS/Tailwind errors.
passed: PostCSS config loads successfully (postcss.config.cjs) - no 'module is not defined' error
Tailwind CSS compiles - /src/index.css returns 200 with --tw-* variables
Login form renders with proper Tailwind styling (blue button bg-primary, rounded inputs, card layout)
'ISP Billing System' title, email/password inputs (with placeholders), Sign In button, Demo Credentials box all visible
No PostCSS/Tailwind related JS errors in browser console
axios AxiosInstance type-import fix verified indirectly (app runs, no build/runtime errors)

failed.issue: Public URL https://network-ops-center-2.preview.emergentagent.com/ returns 502 Bad Gateway (nginx not proxying to Vite on port 3001). Frontend only accessible via localhost:3001.
failed.evidence: curl -I -> HTTP 502 on public URL; localhost:3001 returns 200

failed.issue: Vite HMR websocket tries wss://localhost/?token=... and fails (dev-only cosmetic; does not affect page rendering)
failed.evidence: Console: 'WebSocket connection to wss://localhost/?token=... failed: ERR_CONNECTION_REFUSED'

action_items: PostCSS/Tailwind bug fix is VERIFIED WORKING on localhost:3001. Main agent may proceed.
Optional: configure nginx / preview proxy to route public URL to port 3001 so external testing works.
Optional: set vite server.hmr.clientPort / host so HMR websocket works over the preview proxy.
